title: HRH Fon Fomuki Walters Ticha IX

initiatives.name: GUDECA — Guneku Development and Cultural Association
initiatives.description: International diaspora development and cultural association uniting Guneku indigenes across three continents.

initiatives.name: GUYODECA — Youth Development Association of Guneku
initiatives.description: Youth wing of GUDECA. Bridge construction, football, community gifting.

initiatives.name: GUNECCUL — Guneku Cooperative Credit Union Limited
initiatives.description: Community credit union. Branches in Guneku, Douala, Bamenda. Launched Bamenda branch 2025.

initiatives.name: Agro CIG — Guneku Agro Common Initiative Group
initiatives.description: Launched April 2026. Phase 1: 12.5M FCFA raised. Poultry, catfish, ostrich farming. Located in Ngong Quarter, Guneku.

initiatives.name: Guneku Royal Community Library
initiatives.description: Community library at the Guneku palace to promote literacy and education.

initiatives.name: Tonmukom–Windik Road Project
initiatives.description: Infrastructure project to improve road access within Guneku village.

initiatives.name: Mɨchi Əbeŋ Festival
initiatives.description: Annual cultural festival celebrating Guneku heritage. 2nd edition held April 2024.

initiatives.name: Guneku Fondom Digital Platform 2026
initiatives.description: Official Next.js website for Guneku Fondom — the first AI-powered community site for a Northwest Cameroon Fondom. Developed by Marcel Tabit Akwe / MaxPromo Digital.

initiatives.name: Palace Renovation and Heritage Programme
initiatives.description: Ongoing restoration and cultural preservation of Guneku palace, recognised by the Ministry of Arts and Culture.

initiatives.name: Return Visit to Guneku (2015)
initiatives.description: Historical return to Guneku on 27 February 2015 — the enthronement gathering that marked the beginning of his reign.

enthronementNarrative: On 27 February 2015, sons and daughters of Guneku assembled on the palace grounds of the village for the long-awaited return of HRH Fomuki Walters Ticha — who arrived in younger and energetic clothing, ready to lead the Fondom into a new era. The official Coronation ceremony followed on 17 January 2016 — a historic gathering of Guneku indigenes from Cameroon, Germany, the United States, and beyond. The event was marked by traditional rites, the installation of the new Traditional Council, and the public proclamation of Fomuki Walters Ticha IX as the reigning Fon of Guneku.
governanceStyle: Fon Fomuki Walters Ticha IX leads through a philosophy of unity, development, and diaspora engagement. Based in Germany while maintaining deep ties to the village, he has championed inclusive development through cooperatives (GUNECCUL), youth empowerment (GUYODECA), agricultural enterprise (Agro CIG), and cultural renaissance (Mɨchi Əbeŋ Festival). His governance bridges modern professional life in Europe with his sacred duty as a traditional ruler — embodying the Guneku principle: 'talking and doing'.
quote: We carry Guneku in our hearts wherever we are in the world. But Guneku must grow — in the village, in the diaspora, and in the digital world.
